item.title: 90 Fps unlocker Module [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: 90 Fps unlocker Module [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: ankan005
item.itunes:summary:
90 Fps unlocker Module
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
It's a magisk module to unlock 90 fps. It support various games.
Well there are many module present at a time but trust me try this one , this will give you good hardcore performance.
[read more]

item.title: GSequencer [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: GSequencer [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: joel2001k
item.itunes:summary:
GSequencer
(Music Production)
Advanced Gtk+ Sequencer is a tree based audio processing engine released under the terms of the GNU GPLv3+. It uses extensively threads, supporting LADSPA, DSSI and Lv2 plugin format.
You output to your soundcard using panel, mixer to combine different instruments like drum, matrix, synth, FM synth, SF2 synth, SFZ synth and audio recorder.

[read more]
item.description:
GSequencer
(Music Production)
Advanced Gtk+ Sequencer is a tree based audio processing engine released under the terms of the GNU GPLv3+. It uses extensively threads, supporting LADSPA, DSSI and Lv2 plugin format.
You output to your soundcard using panel, mixer to combine different instruments like drum, matrix, synth, FM synth, SF2 synth, SFZ synth and audio recorder.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GSequencer
(Music Production)
Advanced Gtk+ Sequencer is a tree based audio processing engine released under the terms of the GNU GPLv3+. It uses extensively threads, supporting LADSPA, DSSI and Lv2 plugin format.
You output to your soundcard using panel, mixer to combine different instruments like drum, matrix, synth, FM synth, SF2 synth, SFZ synth and audio recorder.

[read more]

item.title: EllasWar [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:title: EllasWar [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:author: v-paranoiaque
item.itunes:summary:
EllasWar
(Tactics & Strategy)
Explore Ancient Greece on Ellas-War. Start the development of your city by collecting various resources that will help you to construct your buildings.
Venerate the gods by building temples dedicated in their honor, in gratitude they will help you in your conquest!
Venerate Ares that will provide its terrible spartan, Zeus will allow you to engage its legendary Myrmidons.

Federate the other cities and create an alliance, declare war on other city groups and show them your superiority.
Plunder the neighboring cities or trade with them to buy or sell as desired resources.

But be careful, other cities or even the gods can return again you at any time and cause your loss.

Please report problems on GitHub: https://github.com/V-Paranoiaque/Ellas-War/
[read more]
item.description:
EllasWar
(Tactics & Strategy)
Explore Ancient Greece on Ellas-War. Start the development of your city by collecting various resources that will help you to construct your buildings.
Venerate the gods by building temples dedicated in their honor, in gratitude they will help you in your conquest!
Venerate Ares that will provide its terrible spartan, Zeus will allow you to engage its legendary Myrmidons.

Federate the other cities and create an alliance, declare war on other city groups and show them your superiority.
Plunder the neighboring cities or trade with them to buy or sell as desired resources.

But be careful, other cities or even the gods can return again you at any time and cause your loss.

Please report problems on GitHub: https://github.com/V-Paranoiaque/Ellas-War/
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
EllasWar
(Tactics & Strategy)
Explore Ancient Greece on Ellas-War. Start the development of your city by collecting various resources that will help you to construct your buildings.
Venerate the gods by building temples dedicated in their honor, in gratitude they will help you in your conquest!
Venerate Ares that will provide its terrible spartan, Zeus will allow you to engage its legendary Myrmidons.

Federate the other cities and create an alliance, declare war on other city groups and show them your superiority.
Plunder the neighboring cities or trade with them to buy or sell as desired resources.

But be careful, other cities or even the gods can return again you at any time and cause your loss.

Please report problems on GitHub: https://github.com/V-Paranoiaque/Ellas-War/
[read more]

item.title: VocabSieve [E-Learning]
item.itunes:title: VocabSieve [E-Learning]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
VocabSieve
(E-Learning)
VocabSieve is a program for language learning with Anki. Its primary use is sentence mining, in which sentences with target vocabulary words are collected and added into Anki. It is meant to help intermediate learners gain vocabulary efficiently by allowing card creation without interrupting the flow of content immersion. It can also import notes from ereaders (Kindle and ereaders running KOReader), so you can effortlessly make cards with minimal interruption to your reading.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]
item.description:
VocabSieve

VocabSieve is a program for language learning with Anki. Its primary use is sentence mining, in which sentences with target vocabulary words are collected and added into Anki. It is meant to help intermediate learners gain vocabulary efficiently by allowing card creation without interrupting the flow of content immersion. It can also import notes from ereaders (Kindle and ereaders running KOReader), so you can effortlessly make cards with minimal interruption to your reading.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
VocabSieve
(E-Learning)
VocabSieve is a program for language learning with Anki. Its primary use is sentence mining, in which sentences with target vocabulary words are collected and added into Anki. It is meant to help intermediate learners gain vocabulary efficiently by allowing card creation without interrupting the flow of content immersion. It can also import notes from ereaders (Kindle and ereaders running KOReader), so you can effortlessly make cards with minimal interruption to your reading.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]

item.title: Pinokio [Browser]
item.itunes:title: Pinokio [Browser]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Pinokio
(Browser)
Pinokio is a browser that lets you install, run, and programmatically control ANY application, automatically.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.


[read more]

item.title: Hiddify [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Hiddify [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Hiddify
(Internet Apps)
A multi-platform proxy client based on Sing-box universal proxy tool-chain. Hiddify offers a wide range of capabilities, like automatic node selection, TUN mode, remote profiles etc. Hiddify is ad-free and open-source. With support for a wide range of protocols, it provides a secure and private way for accessing free internet.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]
item.description:
Hiddify

A multi-platform proxy client based on Sing-box universal proxy tool-chain. Hiddify offers a wide range of capabilities, like automatic node selection, TUN mode, remote profiles etc. Hiddify is ad-free and open-source. With support for a wide range of protocols, it provides a secure and private way for accessing free internet.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Hiddify
(Internet Apps)
A multi-platform proxy client based on Sing-box universal proxy tool-chain. Hiddify offers a wide range of capabilities, like automatic node selection, TUN mode, remote profiles etc. Hiddify is ad-free and open-source. With support for a wide range of protocols, it provides a secure and private way for accessing free internet.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]

item.title: NVTOP [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: NVTOP [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
NVTOP
(Graphic Apps)
NVTOP stands for Neat Videocard TOP, a (h)top like task monitor for AMD, Intel and NVIDIA GPUs. It can handle multiple GPUs and print information about them in a htop-familiar way.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]
item.description:
NVTOP
(Graphic Apps)
NVTOP stands for Neat Videocard TOP, a (h)top like task monitor for AMD, Intel and NVIDIA GPUs. It can handle multiple GPUs and print information about them in a htop-familiar way.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
NVTOP
(Graphic Apps)
NVTOP stands for Neat Videocard TOP, a (h)top like task monitor for AMD, Intel and NVIDIA GPUs. It can handle multiple GPUs and print information about them in a htop-familiar way.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
